steps.name: postgres-schema-and-migration-runner
steps.summary: Added the pg driver, deterministic 001_blog_core SQL migration, profile-gated local Compose migration runner, and integration coverage for missing schema, vector/core tables, migration version, and idempotent reruns. No OCI DB or repository path was changed.

steps.name: postgres-blog-repository
steps.summary: Added a minimal PostgreSQL blog repository for transactional aggregate writes across the six core tables and published-current reads that reuse the domain selector. Local PostgreSQL tests cover hidden draft/failed content, related records, and rollback after a related write failure; public routes and OCI remain unchanged.

steps.name: db-backed-public-read-path
steps.summary: Replaced static production blog data imports with one request-time PostgreSQL source across blog list/detail/Markdown, crawler outputs, and search. Tests cover DB-only published content, hidden draft/failed/corrected/retracted states, no fixture fallback, configured public crawler origins, local Next/Nginx smoke, and a dynamic production build; worker and OCI behavior remain unchanged.

steps.name: persistent-worker-once-runner
steps.summary: Added a profile-gated manual --once PostgreSQL worker that atomically claims at most one queued/retrying job and persists success, required failure post transitions, retryable retries, and the terminal retry limit. External adapters, polling, cron, OCI runtime, and public publishing remain disabled.

steps.name: local-end-to-end-dry-run
steps.summary: Added a deterministic fake-provider local dry-run that migrates and seeds PostgreSQL, processes one required success and one required failure through the persistent worker, publishes only after all required jobs succeed, and verifies the shared DB version across HTML, Markdown, sitemap, feed, and llms surfaces through Nginx. The failed post remains failed_publish and returns 404; external providers, schedulers, OCI, and production publishing remain disabled.
